name: infolist-entry
description:
The read-only DISPLAY leaf of a detail page: the value variants the kit's infolist entries resolve to, one partial driven by a `type` switch (color | icon | image | code | text). Mirrors io.lievit.kit.schema.infolist's read-only entries (the filament-infolists types carried over): ColorEntry (a swatch + the CSS value), IconEntry (a tinted Lucide icon + optional label), ImageEntry (a sized/circular tile), CodeEntry (a monospace 
 block with language + line-number affordances). Each branch reuses an existing primitive (icon / badge / avatar-style tile) rather than re-implementing. The READ counterpart of a form control: shows a value, never edits one. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the infolist-entry partial to your JTE root at lievit/infolist-entry.jte, reached as @template.lievit.infolist-entry(type="icon", icon="check", color="success"). Route every resolved infolist entry through it by the kit Entry.kind() tag: color renders a swatch + value, icon a tinted Lucide glyph, image a sized/circular tile (requires alt), code a <pre><code> block, and any other type falls through to the plain value. The source is yours: edit freely.
